# Marketing Plan & Timeline

## Phase 1: Foundation (Week 1-4)

### 1. Positioning & Messaging
```
Tagline: "Your AI Inside Sales Agent That Never Sleeps"

Value Props:
- "Convert more leads with 24/7 AI calling"
- "Save $40K/year vs hiring an ISA"
- "80% of leads answer after hours - are you there?"
- "Book more appointments while you focus on closings"
```

### 2. Landing Page (/real-estate)
```
Hero: "Stop Losing Leads to Voicemail"
Subhead: "AI-powered calling that qualifies FSBO, expired, 
          and buyer leads 24/7 - so you can focus on closing deals"

Social Proof: 3 beta customer testimonials
ROI Calculator: Interactive widget
Demo Video: 2-min product walkthrough
CTA: "Start Free Trial" / "Book Demo"
```

### 3. Content Strategy
| Content Type | Topic | Distribution |
|--------------|-------|--------------|
| Blog Post | "How AI is Changing Real Estate Prospecting in 2025" | SEO, LinkedIn |
| Case Study | "How [Brokerage] Booked 47 Appointments in 30 Days" | Website, Email |
| Video | "Watch Our AI Qualify a FSBO Lead" | YouTube, LinkedIn |
| Webinar | "Automate Your ISA: AI Calling for Real Estate" | Zoom, replay on site |
| Calculator | "ISA vs AI Cost Calculator" | Website embed |

---

## Phase 2: Launch & Outreach (Week 5-8)

### 1. Direct Outreach Sequence (via N8N)
```
Day 1: LinkedIn connection request
Day 2: Welcome message (if accepted)
Day 3: Email #1 - Pain point ("Are your agents missing after-hours leads?")
Day 5: Email #2 - Value prop ("How [competitor brokerage] books 3x appointments")
Day 8: Email #3 - Case study + demo offer
Day 12: Email #4 - Limited time offer (waived setup fee)
Day 15: Final email - FOMO ("Last chance for founding member pricing")
```

### 2. Partner Outreach
| Partner Type | Approach | Value Exchange |
|--------------|----------|----------------|
| RE Coaches (Tom Ferry, etc.) | Affiliate partnership | 20% rev share |
| Follow Up Boss | Integration partnership | Co-marketing |
| Transaction Coordinators | Referral partnership | $200 per signup |
| RE Podcasts | Sponsor/Guest | Exposure |
| Facebook Groups | Value-first posting | Lead gen |

### 3. Paid Acquisition (After PMF)
```
LinkedIn Ads:
- Target: Real Estate Broker, Team Lead, Realtor
- Geo: US major metros
- Budget: $2,000/mo test
- Creative: Pain-point focused ("Missing leads after 6pm?")
- CTA: Free trial

Facebook/Instagram:
- Target: RE professionals, ISA managers
- Lookalike: From converted customers
- Budget: $1,500/mo test
- Creative: Before/after results

Google Ads:
- Keywords: "real estate ISA alternative", "AI for real estate", 
            "FSBO calling service", "expired listing calls"
- Budget: $1,000/mo test
```

---

## Phase 3: Scale (Week 9-12)

### 1. Referral Program
```
"Refer a Brokerage, Get $500"
- Referring customer: $500 credit
- New customer: 50% off first month
- Track via unique referral links
- Automate payout via N8N
```

### 2. Community Building
```
- Private Facebook Group: "AI-Powered Real Estate Pros"
- Weekly "Office Hours" Zoom calls
- User-generated content (success stories)
- Beta tester / founding member status
```

### 3. Event Marketing
```
- Virtual: Monthly webinars
- In-person: NAR Conference booth (future)
- Local: RE association chapter presentations
```

---

## 📅 12-Week Execution Timeline

| Week | Development | Marketing | Milestone |
|------|-------------|-----------|-----------|
| **1** | TCPA compliance (start) | Positioning doc | Compliance spec done |
| **2** | TCPA compliance + RE scripts | Landing page design | Scripts written |
| **3** | Outbound dialer (start) | Landing page dev | TCPA module live |
| **4** | Outbound dialer + lead upload | Content creation | Dialer MVP |
| **5** | Lead scoring | Launch landing page | Landing page live |
| **6** | Lead scoring + testing | Outreach sequence setup (N8N) | Lead scoring live |
| **7** | Follow Up Boss integration | Start outreach | 5 beta signups |
| **8** | FUB integration + testing | Partner outreach | FUB integration live |
| **9** | Appointment booking | Case study creation | 10 beta users |
| **10** | SMS channel | Webinar #1 | SMS live |
| **11** | Voicemail detection | Paid ads test | AMD working |
| **12** | Analytics dashboard | Referral program launch | **$10K MRR target** |
